steps.instruction: Line plot shows lengths: 1/4 (2 Xs), 1/2 (3 Xs), 3/4 (1 X).
Multiply each value by its count and add.
steps.explanation: The combined length of all items is 2 3/4 inches.

title: Comparing Data on a Fractional Line Plot

steps.work: 1/8 inch: 3 seeds, 1/4 inch: 5 seeds, 3/8 inch: 2 seeds
steps.explanation: Find the most and least common growth.

steps.instruction: Which value has the most Xs?
steps.work: 1/4 inch has 5 Xs — the most common growth.
steps.explanation: The mode is the most frequent value.
The range tells us the spread of the data.
